bead.title: Visibility 4: ddx agent models [--provider X] [--all] command
bead.description:
Add a new DDx CLI subcommand `ddx agent models [--provider X] [--all]` mirroring ddx-agent's `cmdModels`. Default provider is the configured default. --all lists models for every configured provider. Output format matches ddx-agent's text output exactly (one model ID per line, with * for configured-model marker, > for would-auto-select marker, and [catalog: X] or [pattern] annotations where applicable). No --json yet — that can be a follow-up if needed.

Implementation lives in cli/cmd/agent_models.go. Uses agentconfig + modelcatalog + oaiProvider.RankModels from the Go package. Same upstream-bead rule as visibility 3: if a public helper is missing, file on ddx-agent first, don't copy-paste.
bead.acceptance: (1) `ddx agent models --provider vidar` output matches `ddx-agent models --provider vidar` output. (2) `ddx agent models --all` lists every configured provider's models. (3) Implementation uses Go package imports only — no shell-out, no copy-pasted probing logic. (4) `go build ./...` passes. (5) Manual: compare side-by-side against `ddx-agent models --provider vidar` and verify the 8 models on vidar appear in the same order with the same annotations.
